item.title: It be HOT [OC]
item.description:
We’ve got a wonderful heatwave rn in the Netherlands and I fear I may simply evaporate any time now!
MR. CHONK TAX!! He’s helping me design my little allotment garden house <3
item.dc:creator: AmyRevives

item.title: How History is taught in different countries
item.dc:creator: psuedon

item.title: I'm gonna be in People Magazine!
item.description: Hi Imgurians! I've missed you. I promise I haven't been loafing around - I've got a buncha fun stories to share with you about my recent adventures, but first I wanted to fill you all in on the exciting news that I'm gonna be in a magazine! Weeee! As an added bonus it's one I've heard of too! Here's the online article I mentioned in this video: https://people.com/etch-a-sketch-artist-sells-portraits-for-over-1k-and-been-noticed-by-stars-like-miles-teller-and-kelly-clarkson-exclusive-11772990 2025 has been a pretty amazing year for me. Thank you all for your amazing support, and if you do wind up nabbing the magazine I'd love to know! Feel free to also let me know if you happen to read the article while in the waiting room at the dentist or something too.
item.dc:creator: pikajane

item.title: The media has chosen a side and it is not with the people. You cannot trust your news feeds or search engines.

item.title: Lifeless eyes -- black eyes, like a doll's eyes. When he comes at you, he doesn't seem to be livin' -- until he bites ya
item.dc:creator: JasonM1

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1441 (silverware taxonomy)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
I want to watch birds.
I actually saw a new species for me yesterday after helping harvest Teroldego at a local vineyard!
(My new headcanon about this)
But yeah, Western Sandpiper. Apparently, a few trickle through this time of year as they migrate south to winter along the coastlines of Mexico, this one seemed to be a juvenile. I knew immediately when I looked at it that it was a sandpiper, and it wasn't either of the two species I knew really well because the beak was downcurved, and it had black feet. I pegged it down while watching it as a Dunlin, which I've seen once prior, but when looking at the field guide... nope. I can see why I thought it was a Dunlin, though: similar overall plumage, but the bill in a Dunlin is longer. Pictures will be posted... eventually
Yeah sure. That works
Mood.
I am a bit disappointed the bartending job seems to have fallen flat; i was excited about coming up with some new cocktails themed around the four species of hummingbirds visiting the feeders there.
I might do it anyway, but who knows.
Same also for the Barista gig. Nobody wants me. Sure, people tell me "wow I love your energy," but someone is always better.
I just noticed now the third car on top of the second one, lol.
I'm very reluctant to refer to evangelicals as Christian anymore.
My brain woke me up this morning with this shitty joke: What do you call a society led by folk musicians fond of brass instruments? A Mariachiarchy
You know, that looks comfy.
Yeah that fits.
This is a good thing to inquire.
Resist.
Lol.
Again, I blame Evangelicals for this.
This is a big reason why I love history and archaeology.
As good a way to describe oneself as any
Be nice if someone did this with me, but only post foreplay. Foreplay, as i said to someone yesterday, is as essential for sex as lore is for a story or setting: its the setup for the main events at hand.
Hahaha.
They really would
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "what the fuck? Step up. Up." Today's message from Baja: "No." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.description:

17

19
20
21
22
23
24
25 A Carefully Curated Chorus of Kitties ❤️
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @The9mm creates a lot! Paintings, pins, writes books! Multi-talented. I realize that this is considered an "ad", but I am just supporting a fellow imgurian who works hard and does great work. (The whole point of a Spotlight). If you'd like a print of this work, or to see her others, head to https://www.inprnt.com/gallery/aimeecozza/ If not it's really easy to just scroll by and be nice, this is a museum, after all. Thank you!
27 Man Tax: Idris Elba
“Thousands of candles can be lighted from a single candle, and the life of the candle will not be shortened. Happiness never decreases by being shared.” - Gautama Buddha I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting on it, maybe let it go, don't comment on it and find something that you do like. Seriously y'all. Coming to only comment "omg that's AI" bums me out. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server so you guys can donate memes to the museum for future CCC posts. I don't want to run out! Also, we can hang out, play some trivia, talk about movies & tv and, apparently, rocket launches and epic sleeping. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Pixie & Brutus: Tick
item.description:
Today's Tiabeanie Tax; Bean being a cute little loaf.
Bonus Goat Tax; Took my little one to a goat farm with lots of baby goats. They were very friendly and adorable. Getting the post out early today because I expect to be very busy for the rest of the night. I go forth into battle! Cry havoc! And let loose the diatomaceous earth of war!
item.dc:creator: TheUnnamedPoet

item.title: GovBriefToday - What Happened #194
item.description: ?? Authoritarianism accelerated in just one day. Yesterday Trump federalized DC police. Today his administration said there were plans to extend that beyond 30 days, which literally requires an act of Congress. Meanwhile, they're preparing 600 troops to put down "civil unrest" while the Texas AG asked a judge to jail a political opponent. A different judge had to order ICE to provide beds and food to detained human beings, something the government admitted wasn't happening. This march to authoritarian control is happening in real time and changing hourly. You need to be taking action to stop it every day. Don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at govbrief dot today, on Facebook, or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com 1. https://go.govbrief.today/dc-takover-more-days 2. https://go.govbrief.today/pentagon-plan-civil-unrest 3. https://go.govbrief.today/texas-paxton-judge-beto 4. https://go.govbrief.today/russia-implicated-court-hack 5. https://go.govbrief.today/human-rights-abuse-report 6. https://go.govbrief.today/va-health-staff-shortage 7. https://go.govbrief.today/national-debt-record-high 8. https://go.govbrief.today/bls-suspend-monthly-quarterly 9. https://go.govbrief.today/doge-wins-data-appeal 10. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-ice-improve-conditions 11. https://go.govbrief.today/white-house-smithsonian-review 12. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-gwu-failed-antisemitism 13. https://go.govbrief.today/nsf-grants-ucla-restored 14. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-threatens-fed-lawsuit 15. https://go.govbrief.today/anthropic-claude-dollar-government 16. https://go.govbrief.today/ufc-match-wh-july4 17. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-goldman-sachs-tariffs 18. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-kennedy-center-honors Yesterday's Most Read - https://go.govbrief.today/abbott-threatens-ten-districts Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/texas-tip-line-tweet Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
